scan_output: Vulnerability openscap_036 not found in single-rule scan (possibly fixed)

llm_verdict.message: The provided code is a series of tool calls used to remediate a finding related to the permissions of the /etc/passwd file on a Rocky Linux system. It starts by changing the permissions of the file to 0644, then verifies that the permissions are correct and that there are no setuid/setgid bits set on the file. Finally, it runs a scan to confirm that the vulnerability has been remediated.
